detail.description:
CATFE WORLD – Cozy Cat Café Game

Build your dream cat café in a heartwarming pixel world!
From cat-loving creators in Taiwan comes a relaxing idle simulation filled with adorable cats, sweet treats, and cozy stories to melt your heart.

Help Grandpa Tabby fulfill his lifelong dream — run a 24-hour cat café where every furry visitor has a story to tell.

♥♥ Game Features♥♥ 

1.Collect adorable cat staff
Hire and manage cute cats like oranges, calicos, tuxedos, Bengals, and more. Each has its own
detail.recentChanges:
New Update Is Live!
Dive into the aquarium with me and check out what’s new!

[New area: Aquarium Restaurant]
The cafe is finally underwater! Let the fish come out and meet the guests!
Customers can enjoy their meals surrounded by swimming fish!
